name: InputGroup
description: Flex container that visually groups an input with prefix and/or suffix elements using compound components.
whenToUse: To add icons, buttons, or text add-ons to an input field. Use with InputGroupAddon, InputGroupInput, InputGroupTextarea, InputGroupText, and InputGroupButton.
avoidWhen: When the input stands alone without add-ons.

size.description: Size of the group (sm, md, lg)

parts.name: InputGroupAddon
parts.description: Addon container that positions content at the start or end of an input group.
parts.whenToUse: To wrap icons, text, or buttons that attach to an input.

align.description: Position of the addon relative to the input

parts.name: InputGroupInput
parts.description: Input element designed for use within InputGroup with proper border radius handling.
parts.whenToUse: As the main text input within an InputGroup compound.

parts.name: InputGroupTextarea
parts.description: Textarea element designed for use within InputGroup with block-start/block-end addons.
parts.whenToUse: For multi-line text input within an InputGroup with header/footer addons.

parts.name: InputGroupText
parts.description: Text content for InputGroupAddon, styled as muted helper text.
parts.whenToUse: To display static text like currency symbols, units, or labels in an addon.

parts.name: InputGroupButton
parts.description: Button element designed for use within InputGroupAddon.
parts.whenToUse: For action buttons within an input group (e.g., submit, search, clear).

href.description: If provided, renders as anchor link

route.label: InputGroup
route.description: Input with prefix and suffix slots

examples.title: Text Addons
examples.code:
<sg-stack gap="grouped">
    <sg-input-group aria-label="Price">
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-start">
        <sg-input-group-text>$</sg-input-group-text>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
      <sg-input-group-input type="number" placeholder="0" />
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-end">
        <sg-input-group-text>.00</sg-input-group-text>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
    </sg-input-group>
    <sg-input-group aria-label="Website URL">
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-start">
        <sg-input-group-text>https://</sg-input-group-text>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
      <sg-input-group-input type="url" placeholder="example.com" />
    </sg-input-group>
</sg-stack>

examples.title: Button Addons
examples.code:
<sg-stack gap="grouped">
    <sg-input-group aria-label="Search">
      <sg-input-group-input type="search" placeholder="Search..." />
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-end">
        <sg-input-group-button variant="primary">Go</sg-input-group-button>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
    </sg-input-group>
    <sg-input-group aria-label="Email signup">
      <sg-input-group-input type="email" placeholder="Enter your email" />
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-end">
        <sg-input-group-button variant="secondary">Subscribe</sg-input-group-button>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
    </sg-input-group>
</sg-stack>

examples.title: Icon Addons
examples.code:
<sg-stack gap="grouped">
    <sg-input-group aria-label="Search with icon">
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-start">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
          <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"></circle>
          <line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"></line>
        </svg>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
      <sg-input-group-input type="search" placeholder="Search..." />
    </sg-input-group>
    <sg-input-group aria-label="Email with icon">
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-start">
        <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
          <path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"></path>
          <polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"></polyline>
        </svg>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
      <sg-input-group-input type="email" placeholder="email@example.com" />
    </sg-input-group>
</sg-stack>

examples.title: Size Variants
examples.code:
<sg-stack gap="grouped">
    <sg-input-group size="sm" aria-label="Small input">
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-start">
        <sg-input-group-text>$</sg-input-group-text>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
      <sg-input-group-input placeholder="Small" />
    </sg-input-group>
    <sg-input-group size="md" aria-label="Medium input">
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-start">
        <sg-input-group-text>$</sg-input-group-text>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
      <sg-input-group-input placeholder="Medium" />
    </sg-input-group>
    <sg-input-group size="lg" aria-label="Large input">
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-start">
        <sg-input-group-text>$</sg-input-group-text>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
      <sg-input-group-input placeholder="Large" />
    </sg-input-group>
</sg-stack>

examples.title: Textarea with Addons
examples.code:
<sg-stack gap="grouped">
    <sg-input-group aria-label="Message">
      <sg-input-group-addon align="block-start">
        <sg-input-group-text>Message</sg-input-group-text>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
      <sg-input-group-textarea placeholder="Type your message..." rows="3" />
      <sg-input-group-addon align="block-end">
        <sg-input-group-button variant="primary">Send</sg-input-group-button>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
    </sg-input-group>
</sg-stack>

examples.title: Disabled State
examples.code:
<sg-stack gap="grouped">
    <sg-input-group disabled aria-label="Disabled input">
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-start">
        <sg-input-group-text>$</sg-input-group-text>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
      <sg-input-group-input placeholder="Disabled" />
    </sg-input-group>
</sg-stack>

examples.title: Button Color Variants
examples.code:
<sg-stack gap="grouped">
    <sg-input-group aria-label="Primary action">
      <sg-input-group-input placeholder="Primary" />
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-end">
        <sg-input-group-button variant="primary">Submit</sg-input-group-button>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
    </sg-input-group>
    <sg-input-group aria-label="Danger action">
      <sg-input-group-input placeholder="Delete item" />
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-end">
        <sg-input-group-button variant="danger">Delete</sg-input-group-button>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
    </sg-input-group>
    <sg-input-group aria-label="Success action">
      <sg-input-group-input placeholder="Confirm email" />
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-end">
        <sg-input-group-button variant="success">Confirm</sg-input-group-button>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
    </sg-input-group>
    <sg-input-group aria-label="Outline action">
      <sg-input-group-input placeholder="Search" />
      <sg-input-group-addon align="inline-end">
        <sg-input-group-button variant="outline">Search</sg-input-group-button>
      </sg-input-group-addon>
    </sg-input-group>
</sg-stack>
